name: io.github.lanternrow/namecheap-api-mcp
description: Namecheap API — domains, DNS, contacts, registrar lock, SSL listing, and pricing.

environmentVariables.description: Namecheap API key from Profile -> Tools -> API Access
environmentVariables.name: NAMECHEAP_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Whitelisted public IPv4 of the machine running this server
environmentVariables.name: NAMECHEAP_CLIENT_IP

environmentVariables.description: Username a command runs on behalf of. Defaults to NAMECHEAP_API_USER; differs only for reseller sub-users.
environmentVariables.name: NAMECHEAP_USERNAME
